name: Virginia Speech-Language Pathologist License
description: Already licensed as a speech-language pathologist? Here's whether your license transfers to Virginia - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

provider.name: Board of Audiology and Speech-Language Pathology

address.description: Virginia Board of Audiology and Speech-Language Pathology, Perimeter Center, 9960 Mayland Drive, Suite 300, Henrico, VA 23233-1463

requiredDocuments.name: Background check
requiredDocuments.description: Virginia State Police and FBI background check.

fingerprinting.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

mainEntity.name: How much does a Virginia SLP license cost?
Is Virginia part of the ASLP Interstate Compact?
Does Virginia allow telepractice for SLPs?
Does Virginia have reciprocity for speech-language pathologists?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Virginia participates in the ASLP-IC. If your home state and license qualify for compact privilege, you can typically practice in Virginia without a separate endorsement application.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to transfer my speech-language pathologist license to Virginia?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most endorsement applications take 2 to 4 weeks. If you qualify for an active compact privilege, there may be no separate wait to start practicing.

mainEntity.name: Can I start working in Virginia while my endorsement application is processing?

acceptedAnswer.text: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.
